captures.notes: Canonical Codrops Three.js hub link for attribution and family-level technical framing; local evidence below is generated from scratch for learning review.
Local generated rebuild screenshot showing ricefield-style wire grid, venus-like orbit ribbons, bamboo-like vertical fibers, and shader ribbon pass; not copied from Codrops demos.
Local generated motion clip isolates sweep motion across route families and shader ribbons; not copied from Codrops demos.
Standalone local HTML/SVG exercise reconstructing the primitive with generated mesh routes, wire crossings, shader ribbons, route nodes, and CSS-only sweep motion.
Manifest lists only generated local learning evidence plus source-link attribution boundaries.

payload.route_width_model: crisp thick strokes over wider translucent material ribbons
payload.spatial_role: turns line paths into 3D-feeling sculptural objects without filled mesh surfaces

modules.review_notes: Complete for first-pass learning: still image, motion clip, and HTML note all represent the same meshline family primitive.

payload.scaffold_role: low-opacity crossings make the line sculpture's ground plane and direction reviewable
payload.visual_model: ricefield-like coordinate furrows under the meshline routes

modules.review_notes: Wire-grid layer is complete enough to teach route scaffolding separately from decorative line motion.

payload.source_boundary: does not claim Codrops shader code, TSL nodes, WebGPU renderer, or exact demo materials

modules.review_notes: Material layer is explicit enough to teach pass separation: scaffold, shader ribbon, crisp route, and sweep state.

payload.motion_model: subtle sweep offsets rather than high-cost camera or particle simulation
payload.runtime_target: offline SVG/CSS review exercise; production analogue would use Three.js MeshLine-style geometry and TSL/WebGPU materials

modules.review_notes: Runtime payload is complete because it names bounded counts and the review-safe motion model.

payload.evidence_layer: local PNG proves route families and wire scaffold, local GIF proves sweep motion, HTML note proves the rebuild taxonomy
payload.review_gap: canonical hub remains link-only; local rebuild teaches mechanics without upstream demos or assets
payload.route_decision: use mesh routes for claim pathways, wire crossings for source-coordinate scaffolding, shader ribbons for confidence emphasis, and sweep motion for analyst attention
payload.source_trail: canonical Codrops Three.js hub plus generated local reconstruction
payload.uncertainty: exact linked demo geometry, materials, and runtime implementation are not claimed

modules.review_notes: VULCA mapping is complete because source, evidence, review gap, route decision, and uncertainty are all represented.

summary: 2025+ Three.js MeshLines demo family rebuilt as a local meshline, wire-grid, and shader-ribbon learning primitive with still, motion, code, and asset evidence.
title: Codrops Three.js MeshLines Demo Family
why_relevant: Completes a contemporary line-sculpture anchor for the atlas: thick vector routes, spatial wire scaffolds, and shader-material sweep states.
